tests.test_body:
define i1 @icmp_eq_multiuse_negative(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i1 @icmp_eq_multiuse_negative
; CHECK-SAME: (i8 [[ARG:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SUB:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 [[ARG]], i8 -2)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[ARG]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use.i8(i8 [[SUB]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP]]
  %sub = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 %arg, i8 -2)
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %sub, 1
  call void @use.i8(i8 %sub)
  ret i1 %cmp
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8, i8) #0

declare void @use.i8(i8)

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

issue.title: [InstCombine] Comparison of usub.sat does not fold
issue.body:
We fail to fold icmp of usub.sat in some cases, e.g. https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/oeb8f6.

The general rule here should go something like this:

    (arg < C ? 0 : arg - C) pred C2
    arg < C ? 0 pred C2 : (arg - C) pred C2

    # Assuming 0 pred C2 is false
    arg >= C && (arg - C) pred C2

    # Assuming 0 pred C2 is true
    arg < C || (arg - C) pred C2

Where the remaining and/or of icmps can fold into one comparison in many cases.
issue.author: nikic
